typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED; SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY LOW;  SELECT	[ax].[ITEMID], 	[ax].[STATUSISSUE], 	[ax].[INTERCOMPANYINVENTDIMTRANSFERRED], 	[ax].[DATEPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[QTY], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTPOSTED], 	[ax].[CURRENCYCODE], 	[ax].[INVOICEID], 	[ax].[VOUCHER], 	[ax].[DATEEXPECTED], 	[ax].[DATEFINANCIAL], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[STATUSRECEIPT], 	[ax].[PACKINGSLIPRETURNED], 	[ax].[INVOICERETURNED], 	[ax].[PACKINGSLIPID], 	[ax].[VOUCHERPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTADJUSTMENT], 	[ax].[SHIPPINGDATEREQUESTED], 	[ax].[SHIPPINGDATECONFIRMED], 	[ax].[QTYSETTLED], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSETTLED], 	[ax].[VALUEOPEN], 	[ax].[ACTIVITYNUMBER], 	[ax].[DATESTATUS], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSTD], 	[ax].[DATECLOSED], 	[ax].[PICKINGROUTEID], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTOPERATIONS], 	[ax].[RETURNINVENTTRANSORIGIN], 	[ax].[PROJID], 	[ax].[PROJCATEGORYID], 	[ax].[INVENTDIMID], 	[ax].[MARKINGREFINVENTTRANSORIGIN], 	[ax].[INVENTDIMFIXED], 	[ax].[DATEINVENT], 	[ax].[TRANSCHILDREFID], 	[ax].[TRANSCHILDTYPE], 	[ax].[TIMEEXPECTED], 	[ax].[REVENUEAMOUNTPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[PROJADJUSTREFID], 	[ax].[TAXAMOUNTPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[INVENTTRANSORIGIN], 	[ax].[STORNO_RU], 	[ax].[STORNOPHYSICAL_RU], 	[ax].[INVENTDIMIDSALES_RU], 	[ax].[GROUPREFTYPE_RU], 	[ax].[GROUPREFID_RU], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSECCURPOSTED_RU], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSECCURPHYSICAL_RU], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSECCURADJUSTMENT_RU], 	[ax].[DATECLOSEDSECCUR_RU], 	[ax].[QTYSETTLEDSECCUR_RU], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSETTLEDSECCUR_RU], 	[ax].[VALUEOPENSECCUR_RU], 	[ax].[COSTAMOUNTSTDSECCUR_RU], 	[ax].[INVENTTRANSORIGINDELIVERY_RU], 	[ax].[INVENTTRANSORIGINSALES_RU], 	[ax].[INVENTTRANSORIGINTRANSIT_RU], 	[ax].[PDSCWQTY], 	[ax].[PDSCWSETTLED], 	[ax].[DATAAREAID], 	[ax].[RECVERSION], 	[ax].[PARTITION], 	[ax].[RECID], 	[ax].[EBCENGTRIAL], 	[ax].[SEMPPVAMOUNTPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[SEMDATECODE], 	[ax].[SEMPREVSTATUSRECEIPT], 	[ax].[SEMCONSIGNEDREFERENCE], 	[ax].[ECMREVLEVEL], 	[ax].[ECMREVLEVELDRAWING], 	[ax].[SEMINVENTBATCHID], 	[ax].[ADEC_OVERHEADAMOUNTPHYSICAL], 	[ax].[ADEC_OVERHEADPERCENT], 	[ax].[ADEC_MARK], 	[ax].[ADEC_UNITSALESPRICE] FROM	[AX2012R2_EDW].[dbo].[INVENTTRANS] [ax] WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN [dbo].[ztmp_INVENTTRANS_IDs] [t] 	ON	( 			([ax].[RECID] = [t].[RECID]) 		AND 			([ax].[PARTITION] = [t].[PARTITION]) 		AND 			([ax].[DATAAREAID] = [t].[DATAAREAID]) 		)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> AXSource
AXSource sink(input(
		ECMREVLEVEL as string,
		STORNO_RU as integer,
		INVOICEID as string,
		VOUCHERPHYSICAL as string,
		INTERCOMPANYINVENTDIMTRANSFERRED as integer,
		PROJADJUSTREFID as string,
		SEMPREVSTATUSRECEIPT as integer,
		SEMPPVAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		DATESTATUS as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TRANSCHILDREFID as string,
		PROJID as string,
		QTY as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINDELIVERY_RU as long,
		VALUEOPEN as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		SEMCONSIGNEDREFERENCE as string,
		STATUSRECEIPT as integer,
		PDSCWQTY as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLED as integer,
		QTYSETTLED as integer,
		QTYSETTLEDSECCUR_RU as integer,
		PICKINGROUTEID as string,
		RECID as long,
		REVENUEAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		ECMREVLEVELDRAWING as string,
		VALUEOPENSECCUR_RU as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGIN as long,
		PACKINGSLIPRETURNED as integer,
		ADEC_MARK as integer,
		ITEMID as string,
		ACTIVITYNUMBER as string,
		DATECLOSEDSECCUR_RU as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADEC_OVERHEADAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		SEMINVENTBATCHID as string,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLEDSECCUR_RU as integer,
		STATUSISSUE as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINTRANSIT_RU as long,
		TAXAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		INVENTDIMID as string,
		TIMEEXPECTED as integer,
		PDSCWSETTLED as integer,
		STORNOPHYSICAL_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTADJUSTMENT as integer,
		PROJCATEGORYID as string,
		DATEINVENT as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADEC_UNITSALESPRICE as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURADJUSTMENT_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTOPERATIONS as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPHYSICAL_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		SEMDATECODE as string,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		INVENTDIMIDSALES_RU as string,
		DATEFINANCIAL as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		COSTAMOUNTPOSTED as integer,
		SHIPPINGDATECONFIRMED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DATECLOSED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADEC_OVERHEADPERCENT as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPOSTED_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSTDSECCUR_RU as integer,
		INVOICERETURNED as integer,
		INVENTDIMFIXED as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINSALES_RU as long,
		CURRENCYCODE as string,
		GROUPREFID_RU as string,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		GROUPREFTYPE_RU as integer,
		SHIPPINGDATEREQUESTED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DATEEXPECTED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		RETURNINVENTTRANSORIGIN as long,
		MARKINGREFINVENTTRANSORIGIN as long,
		VOUCHER as string,
		DATEPHYSICAL as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TRANSCHILDTYPE as integer,
		PACKINGSLIPID as string,
		COSTAMOUNTSTD as integer,
		EBCENGTRIAL as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ECMREVLEVEL,
		STORNO_RU,
		INVOICEID,
		VOUCHERPHYSICAL,
		INTERCOMPANYINVENTDIMTRANSFERRED,
		PROJADJUSTREFID,
		SEMPREVSTATUSRECEIPT,
		SEMPPVAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		DATESTATUS,
		TRANSCHILDREFID,
		PROJID,
		QTY,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINDELIVERY_RU,
		VALUEOPEN,
		PARTITION,
		SEMCONSIGNEDREFERENCE,
		STATUSRECEIPT,
		PDSCWQTY,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLED,
		QTYSETTLED,
		QTYSETTLEDSECCUR_RU,
		PICKINGROUTEID,
		RECID,
		REVENUEAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		ECMREVLEVELDRAWING,
		VALUEOPENSECCUR_RU,
		INVENTTRANSORIGIN,
		PACKINGSLIPRETURNED,
		ADEC_MARK,
		ITEMID,
		ACTIVITYNUMBER,
		DATECLOSEDSECCUR_RU,
		ADEC_OVERHEADAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		SEMINVENTBATCHID,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLEDSECCUR_RU,
		STATUSISSUE,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINTRANSIT_RU,
		TAXAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		INVENTDIMID,
		TIMEEXPECTED,
		PDSCWSETTLED,
		STORNOPHYSICAL_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTADJUSTMENT,
		PROJCATEGORYID,
		DATEINVENT,
		ADEC_UNITSALESPRICE,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURADJUSTMENT_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTOPERATIONS,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPHYSICAL_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		SEMDATECODE,
		DATAAREAID,
		INVENTDIMIDSALES_RU,
		DATEFINANCIAL,
		COSTAMOUNTPOSTED,
		SHIPPINGDATECONFIRMED,
		DATECLOSED,
		ADEC_OVERHEADPERCENT,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPOSTED_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTSTDSECCUR_RU,
		INVOICERETURNED,
		INVENTDIMFIXED,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINSALES_RU,
		CURRENCYCODE,
		GROUPREFID_RU,
		RECVERSION,
		GROUPREFTYPE_RU,
		SHIPPINGDATEREQUESTED,
		DATEEXPECTED,
		RETURNINVENTTRANSORIGIN,
		MARKINGREFINVENTTRANSORIGIN,
		VOUCHER,
		DATEPHYSICAL,
		TRANSCHILDTYPE,
		PACKINGSLIPID,
		COSTAMOUNTSTD,
		EBCENGTRIAL)) ~> StagingDestination
